headline: Major Claude Code Desktop Update: Multiple Sessions Side-by-Side
summary: Anthropic officially announced a redesigned Claude Code desktop experience. Users can now run multiple Claude sessions side-by-side in a single window with a new sidebar to manage them.

headline: Anthropic Preparing Claude Opus 4.7 and New AI Design Tool
summary: According to an exclusive report from The Information, Anthropic is preparing Opus 4.7 alongside a new AI design tool (vibe coding/design tool). Official announcement expected within the next few days.

headline: SAP Launches Agentic AI Directly in Human Capital Management
summary: SAP announced the integration of autonomous agentic AI directly into its human resources management solutions, enabling complex automated tasks within enterprise systems.

headline: Amazon Launches AI Research Tool to Accelerate Early Drug Discovery
summary: Amazon announced a new AI-powered research tool to accelerate early-stage drug discovery, available to researchers and pharmaceutical institutions.

headline: Google Adds "AI Skills" to Chrome and Launches Gemini Personal Intelligence in India
summary: Google announced the addition of AI Skills to Chrome for saving and reusing AI-assisted workflows. Gemini Personal Intelligence also officially launched in India.

headline: Bank of England Governor Raises Security Concerns Over Anthropic's Mythos Model
summary: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey expressed major security concerns about Anthropic's new Mythos model, warning of cybersecurity risks to banks and financial institutions.

headline: Anthropic Adds Novartis CEO to Its Board of Directors
summary: Anthropic added the CEO of Novartis to its board of directors, signaling a stronger push toward medical and enterprise AI applications.

headline: Alibaba's HappyHorse 1.0 Tops Global Video Generation Rankings
summary: Alibaba's new video generation model HappyHorse 1.0 has topped global rankings in the space, according to WSJ reports.
